scripts._comment_local_deploy: --- LOCAL DEPLOY TEST (docker-compose.deploy.yml) — prod builds, named volumes ---
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.storage:probe: npm run build -w apps/api && node apps/api/dist/scripts/storage-probe.js
scripts._comment_droplet: --- DROPLET / PRODUCTION (docker-compose.droplet.yml) — remote deploy on docker-2 ---
scripts.droplet:build: ssh docker-2 'cd /opt/docker/projects/pageforge && docker compose -f docker-compose.droplet.yml --env-file .env.droplet build api web'
scripts.droplet:up: ssh docker-2 'cd /opt/docker/projects/pageforge && docker compose -f docker-compose.droplet.yml --env-file .env.droplet up -d --no-deps api web nginx'
scripts.droplet:logs: ssh docker-2 'cd /opt/docker/projects/pageforge && docker compose -f docker-compose.droplet.yml --env-file .env.droplet logs -f --tail=100'
scripts.droplet:logs:api: ssh docker-2 'cd /opt/docker/projects/pageforge && docker compose -f docker-compose.droplet.yml --env-file .env.droplet logs -f --tail=200 api'
